hero.subtitle: TRAI STARTUP INCUBATOR
hero.title: Your Startup. Our Infrastructure. Unstoppable Growth.
hero.description: We don't just invest — we co-build. Trai Incubator gives early-stage founders the engineering firepower, cloud infrastructure, and go-to-market systems they need to go from zero to funded.

programs.title: Trai Catalyst — Zero to One
programs.desc: For first-time founders with a validated problem. We help you ship your MVP, set up your tech stack, acquire your first 10 paying customers, and build the foundation for scale.

programs.title: Trai Velocity — Seed to Series A
programs.desc: For startups with early traction. We scale your engineering team, automate your sales funnel, optimize unit economics, and prepare you for institutional fundraising.

what_you_get.title: Elite Engineering Support
what_you_get.desc: Direct access to senior solutions architects, full-stack developers, and DevOps engineers. We don't advise — we ship code alongside you.

what_you_get.title: Up to ₹50L in Cloud Credits
what_you_get.desc: AWS, Google Cloud, and Azure credits so you can build, test, and scale without burning your runway on infrastructure.

what_you_get.title: Automated Sales Engine
what_you_get.desc: We deploy high-intent lead generation systems, CRM automation, and AI-powered outreach sequences to fill your sales pipeline from day one.

what_you_get.title: Go-to-Market Strategy
what_you_get.desc: SEO, content marketing, performance ads, and social media — our growth team builds your digital presence while you focus on product.

what_you_get.title: Investor Network Access
what_you_get.desc: Warm introductions to top-tier VC firms, angel investors, and corporate venture arms in the enterprise tech space. We help you raise smart capital.

what_you_get.title: Workspace & Community
what_you_get.desc: Co-working space at our Lucknow HQ, access to founder meetups, demo days, and a tight-knit community of builders who push each other forward.

process.title: Apply
process.desc: Submit your application with your problem statement, early traction, and what you need help with.

process.title: Deep Dive
process.desc: Our team reviews your application. Selected founders get a 1-on-1 call with our incubation lead.

process.title: Onboard
process.desc: Accepted founders get a dedicated engineering pod, cloud credits, and a 90-day sprint plan.

process.title: Build & Ship
process.desc: Weekly standups, monthly demos, and relentless focus on shipping product and acquiring customers.

ideal_founder.title: Who Should Apply?
traits: You have a clearly defined problem and a target customer segment
You've done initial validation — conversations, waitlists, or early revenue
You need engineering and infrastructure support, not just advice
You're building in SaaS, AI/ML, FinTech, HealthTech, or Enterprise software
You're ready to commit full-time and move fast

cta.title: Ready to build something real?
cta.description: Applications for our Q3 2026 cohort are open. We back founders who ship fast, think deeply, and refuse to quit.

external_cta.title: Need startup funding or grants?
external_cta.description: Bharat Startup Launchpad helps founders access government grants, credits, and funding programs.
